concept: edge identification models and quotient invariants

models.local_seam_test: two ordinary half-neighborhoods meet without a twist
models.recipe: identify one opposite edge pair with matching direction

models.local_seam_test: the seam is locally ordinary, but a transverse arrow returns reversed
models.recipe: identify one opposite edge pair with reversed direction

models.local_seam_test: each edge neighborhood is paired with its opposite mate
models.recipe: identify both opposite edge pairs with matching directions

models.local_seam_test: boundary pairs become ordinary surface neighborhoods after quotienting
models.recipe: identify every boundary point of a disk with its antipode
